overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night. The scene transitions from an open prairie with a distant smoke plume to a path lined with trees, passing a wooden signpost and approaching a railroad crossing signal.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland with a distant fire smoke plume visible on the horizon

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through the grassland
tall green grass covering the prairie on both sides of the path
dark smoke rising into the night sky from a distant fire
sparse trees dotting the rolling hills in the distance
dark starry sky with faint clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night. The landscape is wide and exposed under a starry sky, with a prominent smoke plume visible on the right horizon suggesting a distant fire or camp.

events.description: fade from black into new section of trail with wooden signpost visible ahead
character passes the wooden signpost on the right side of the path
railroad crossing signal with semaphore arm becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through slightly more wooded terrain, passing a wooden signpost and approaching a railroad crossing

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with directional signs beside the trail
large boulder formation visible on the right side of the path
tall railroad semaphore signal with crossbuck at the path intersection

segments.scene_description: Following a brief transition, the character continues walking through a slightly more enclosed section of trail with denser tree coverage. The character passes a wooden signpost and approaches a railroad crossing signal visible ahead in the distance, while the smoke plume from the previous area is no longer visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, nocturnal prairie that maintains a sense of isolation under a starry sky. It begins with a character walking along a narrow dirt trail, surrounded by wide and exposed grasslands. As the camera tracks forward, the open landscape reveals a prominent smoke plume rising on the right horizon, suggesting a distant fire or camp. The scene remains focused on this steady progression through the dark wilderness before the path continues deeper into the night.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a dirt trail that shifts from an open prairie into a more enclosed, wooded corridor. It begins with the character walking forward, leaving behind the open grasslands as the surrounding tree coverage becomes denser and more restrictive. As the path narrows, the camera passes a weathered wooden signpost while the distant smoke plume from the previous landscape fades from view. The scene then focuses on the trail ahead, steadily approaching a railroad crossing signal that emerges from the shadows of the nighttime forest.
